title: Luffy Strikes Back at Krieg
scene: On pages 13–16, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Don Krieg relies on armor and hidden weapons while Luffy answers with reckless determination.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Can't you see that the greatest armour and weaponry,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And those who defy the strong are doomed to die,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ahh! He's going to throw those bombs down to destroy that whole platform! Run away, errand boy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You idiot, don't run towards him! Get away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How useless... Because that's exactly what...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There are some things you can't overcome with willpower alone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kuhahahaha! Your attack was useless again! This is the extent of your strength!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But I'll compliment you for managing to put a small crack in my armour!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Perhaps it stems from his complete preparedness to survive no matter what,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Or his conviction that fears no death...

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
